name: ai_autopilot
description: AI-powered auto-queue for Volumio. Picks the next track from TIDAL/Qobuz based on your taste using Claude/OpenAI, Last.fm, Spotify, or a local model.
author: Daeyeol <samadhy81@gmail.com>

volumio_info.details: Auto-queues the next track based on your listening history. Works with installed TIDAL and Qobuz plugins as the music source. Supports multiple AI back-ends: LLM (Claude/OpenAI), Last.fm, Spotify, or a local recommender.
